_meta.corpus: Fig & Bloom Right Hook Email Design Corpus DB
_meta.enumeration_method: Notion MCP has no bulk-query/count tool and no API token in env; full ID set harvested via ~30 saturating semantic searches (union/dedup) then every page fetched individually for authoritative properties.
_meta.visual_sample_method: stratified across MIME (PNG/GIF) and all campaign types; images downloaded from brand CDN; dimensions+animation parsed from PNG IHDR / GIF logical-screen+frame headers; layout/colour/type/illustration/above-fold classified from Chromium-rendered contact sheets.
_meta.visual_review_coverage: 157 unique emails (74% of 212) visually reviewed via Chromium contact sheets; an initial 41-image stratified pass plus a 116-image second pass (deduped by content hash). Dimension/animation stats below are from the original 41-image stratified subset unless noted.

dimensions.note: All emails are a single 600px-wide column; bodies are very long vertical scrolls (median ~5000px). Above-the-fold window is only the top ~700px.

gif_hero.finding: image/gif ALWAYS means an animated hero (20/20 sampled GIFs were multi-frame). ~1 in 3 corpus emails ships one.

above_fold_cta.method: visual count from Chromium top-700px contact sheet of the 41-image stratified sample
above_fold_cta.finding: Majority of emails place the primary CTA BELOW the ~700px fold: the opening is logo header + photo/type hero, and the first square black button typically falls ~700-1200px down. Drives the new above-the-fold layout rule + pre-flight check.

block_taxonomy._about: Frequency of recurring DESIGNED visual blocks (graphic-composed, sliced-to-PNG style) observed across the stratified visual sample. Frequencies are share of sampled emails that contain at least one instance (rounded), not mutually exclusive.

editorial_hero.note: photo + Lust headline + Cervanttis accent + button on overlapping plate

caption_bar_hero.note: full-bleed photo with a thin caption/super-label bar; common opening on editorial/occasion sends — BUILD

designed_product_card.note: product spotlight with designed name/price/occasion treatment + optional badge (bestseller/scarcity) — richer than plain card-* — BUILD

polaroid_collage.note: tilted overlapping photos + pull-quote; UGC / reviews / multi-occasion

story_block.note: founder/editorial: portrait + narrative + signature (Dan & Kellie / Penny) — BUILD

offer_promo_panel.note: BUILT as blocks/offer-panel: huge Lust offer value + dashed code box + rotated Cervanttis sticker; promo/sale/free-ship/rewards + giveaway mode. Confirmed across the 157-email review.

howto_care_steps.note: CANDIDATE (recommended next build): vertical numbered how-to / care sequence with an image per step (refresh, dry, make-last, eucalyptus, arranging, home-spots). Distinct from the horizontal three-column-steps-* partner-flow and from feature-list RTB bullets.

comparison_vs.note: CANDIDATE (niche / optional): side-by-side 'vs' block (us-vs-them, what-we-bought-vs-got, before/after). Low frequency.

giveaway_panel.note: NOT a separate block — handled as GIVEAWAY MODE of offer-panel (PROMO_CODE empty, prize in OFFER_VALUE).

design_system_confirmation.palette: monochrome Noir(#000)/White/Clay(#D8CCBE) dominates; seasonal accent panels in ~15-20% of emails (occasion/promo only) — within locked rules
design_system_confirmation.type: Lust display + Cervanttis lowercase script accents + Neuzeit Grotesk body — consistent across corpus
design_system_confirmation.illustration: faint brand botanical line-art as section accents (low opacity) — present, subtle
